prompts.title: 四季更迭全景图
prompts.prompt:
超写实数字插画，场景为 {argument name="scene" default="从历史悠久的上海滩滨水区眺望黄浦江对岸未来感十足的陆家嘴区域"}，以单一连续构图呈现四季轮回。画面从左至右自然过渡：冬、春、夏、秋。

季节之间没有明显的分割线；天气、光影与植被平滑融合，营造出统一而和谐的全景效果。细节丰富，象征时光流逝，电影级光影，8k 分辨率，高细节纹理。 --ar 4:3

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 自由女神像技术信息图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed vertical museum-style infographic poster about {argument name="monument name" default="自由女神像"}, combining Chinese primary typography with small English subtitles, as if from an architectural history atlas.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, warm ivory paper background with faint grid lines, thin technical drafting rules, subtle aging texture, and precise editorial margins. Use a refined beige, charcoal, muted bronze, oxidized copper green, and faded gray palette.

Main title area: At the top center place the large black Chinese headline “自由女神像”, with the English title “STATUE OF LIBERTY” beneath it in spaced serif capitals. Add a small bilingual motto line below: “自由照亮世界，人类追求自由与希望的永恒象征” and “FREEDOM ILLUMINATES THE WORLD, AN ETERNAL SYMBOL OF HUMAN PURSUIT OF LIBERTY AND HOPE.”

Central subject: Dominating the middle, show a full-height Statue of Liberty technical cutaway. The left half should be the exterior oxidized copper statue with flowing robes, raised torch, crown spikes, and tablet; the right half should be sliced open to reveal dark iron lattice scaffolding, internal stairs, cross-bracing, and pedestal structure. Render it as realistic engraved architectural illustration with soft shadows and precise linework.

Left information column: Add a narrow sidebar titled “基本信息 / BASIC INFORMATION” with exactly 8 icon-and-text entries: official name, location, dedication date, designer, sculptor, total height, weight, and symbolism. Below it add “材料与工艺 / MATERIALS & CRAFTSMANSHIP” with exactly 4 stacked material swatches: copper sheets, wrought iron frame, granite base, and concrete foundation. Add a small “关键数据 / KEY DATA” block with exactly 6 compact numeric rows.

Left of central statue: Add “结构解析 / STRUCTURAL ANALYSIS” with exactly 4 circular magnified callout diagrams connected to the statue: torch structure, head structure, internal skeleton, and copper fixing method. Each circle contains a cropped technical detail, short Chinese label, English subtitle, and two short annotation lines.

Right analytical panels: Add “尺寸图与比例 / DIMENSIONS & PROPORTIONS” with exactly 5 diagrams: full statue height comparison, statue-only height, pedestal height, top-view star-shaped base diagram, and base-width measurement. Add “结构系统分解 / STRUCTURAL SYSTEM BREAKDOWN” with exactly 5 stacked exploded mini illustrations: copper exterior, iron framework, internal spiral/stair system, granite pedestal, and concrete foundation.

Far-right sidebar: Add “环境与耐久性 / ENVIRONMENT & DURABILITY” with exactly 4 icon entries: wind resistance, structural design, temperature range, and lightning safety. Add “方向与视野 / ORIENTATION & VIEWSHED” with a compass rose and a pale New York Harbor map, including radial sight lines. Add “全球影响力 / GLOBAL IMPACT” with exactly 4 icon entries: symbol of immigration, annual visitors, global freedom icon, and cultural influence.

Bottom middle band: Add “历史时间线 / HISTORY TIMELINE” on the lower left with exactly 8 dated milestones from concept, design, construction, shipment, assembly, dedication, restoration, and modern preservation. Across the lower center add “建造过程与运输安装 / CONSTRUCTION & ASSEMBLY PROCESS” with exactly 7 numbered sepia photo cards labeled 01 to 07: selected fabrication, disassembly and crating, maritime transportation, pedestal construction, statue assembly, final completion, and public opening. Each card has a small archival image, number, Chinese label, and English subtitle.

Bottom scenic footer: The entire bottom quarter should be a cinematic panoramic scene of the Statue of Liberty on Liberty Island at golden-hour sunset, with New York City skyline in the background, calm harbor water, ferries, warm clouds, and atmospheric haze. Overlay white text on the left titled “自由的灯塔 / THE BEACON OF FREEDOM” followed by a short paragraph about welcoming people from across the world. On the right overlay “设计理念 / DESIGN PHILOSOPHY” with exactly 4 icon entries: Neoc

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - FN SCAR-L 战术规格表
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a dark tactical firearm character-sheet style technical poster for the {argument name="rifle model" default="FN SCAR-L"}, presented as a clean military product infographic.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster on a matte charcoal-black textured background, with worn tan stencil typography and thin muted-gray grid lines. Use realistic studio-rendered firearm illustrations in flat side profile, colored coyote tan and black, with subtle scratches, edge wear, and soft shadows.

Header: At the top left, place a huge distressed stencil title reading “FN SCAR-L”. Beneath it, add three smaller lines: “[SPECIAL OPERATIONS FORCES COMBAT ASSAULT RIFLE – LIGHT]”, “{argument name="caliber line" default="5.56x45mm NATO / 7.62x51mm NATO"}”, and “{argument name="tagline" default="THE MODULAR BATTLE RIFLE FOR THE MODERN WARRIOR"}”. At the top right, include a circular FN monogram-style logo and the text “FN HERSTAL”.

Main visual layout: Show exactly 4 firearm views/assemblies. 1) A large full-length left-facing side profile rifle spanning the upper half, dominant and highly detailed. 2) A smaller full rifle side profile beneath it on the right, used for numbered feature callouts. 3) A partially disassembled upper receiver and barrel assembly in the lower middle, with barrel components separated horizontally. 4) A lower receiver/stock assembly below it, with magazine removed and a small loose pin or screw nearby. Add one cropped rifle detail close-up at the bottom right inside the caliber conversion box.

Feature callouts: Include exactly 6 numbered callouts with small square labels and fine leader lines pointing to rifle parts. The numbered list at left must read: 1 “MIL-STD-1913 TOP RAIL” with subtext “For optics and accessories”; 2 “SIDE FOLDING STOCK” with subtext “Adjustable length of pull”; 3 “AMBIDEXTROUS CONTROLS” with subtext “Selector, magazine release, and bolt catch”; 4 “FREE-FLOATING HANDGUARD” with subtext “With accessory rails at 3, 6, and 9 o’clock”; 5 “QUICK-CHANGE BARREL” with subtext “Caliber conversion in minutes”; 6 “SHORT-STROKE GAS PISTON” with subtext “Reliable in adverse conditions”.

Specification table: Place a boxed table in the lower left titled “SPECIFICATIONS [5.56x45mm]”. Include exactly 10 rows: Caliber: 5.56x45mm NATO; Operation: Gas-operated, short-stroke piston; Magazine capacity: 30 rounds (STANAG); Overall length: 35.25 in (895 mm); Barrel length: 16.25 in (413 mm); Weight (unloaded): 7.50 lb (3.40 kg); Rate of fire: 625–650 rounds/min; Muzzle velocity: ~2,750 ft/s (838 m/s); Effective range: 500 m; Sights: Iron sights, foldable (front & rear), optic ready (MIL-STD-1913 rail).

Bottom information panels: Add two boxed text panels along the bottom. Left panel: a short paragraph explaining that the FN SCAR-L is a modular assault rifle designed for U.S. Special Operations Command and chambered in 5.56x45mm NATO, emphasizing reliability, accuracy, adaptability, and lightweight battle-proven use. Right panel title: “CALIBER CONVERSION”, followed by text explaining quick conversion using FN’s quick-change barrel system and exactly 2 bullet calibers: “5.56x45mm NATO (SCAR-L)” and “7.62x51mm NATO (SCAR-H)”.

Visual constraints: Keep all text in English, crisp and legible; use a professional weapon manual / defense catalog aesthetic; avoid people, hands, firing effects, flags, or clutter; maintain precise orthographic side views and a subdued black, tan, and gray color palette.

The scene features a lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a blocky green creeper stands on the grass, while a blocky brown wolf stands on the dirt path to the right. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.

prompts.title: 二战诺曼底登陆电影海报
prompts.prompt: 一张充满质感的二战电影海报，采用垂直单页布局，设计风格如同现代高规格战争片广告。海报顶部居中显示两行压缩大写标语：{argument name="top tagline" default="勇气。兄弟情。牺牲。"} 和 {argument name="second tagline" default="胜利的代价。"}。主体构图为 4 名身着深橄榄色制服、佩戴大网眼 M1 头盔的美国二战士兵：1 名占据主导地位的中央士兵半身像面向前方，两侧各有 3 名略小的士兵，左侧 1 名，右侧 2 名。他们的面部笼罩在阴影中，布满污垢，饱经战火，光影效果强烈，伴有烟雾缭绕的背光。背景是战火纷飞的阴沉天空，充斥着浓烟、火花、余烬以及 2 组飞机：左上方 3 架，右上方 5 架。画面中部有一行居中的小字：{argument name="based on text" default="根据真实事件改编"}。下方是巨大的粗体块状做旧标题：{argument name="movie title" default="D-DAY"}，两个 D 字母之间用星号分隔。标题下方是一行红色的压缩日期：{argument name="date text" default="1944 年 6 月 6 日"}。下半部分展示了从敞开的登陆艇内部视角看到的诺曼底登陆场景，两侧由两扇深色金属斜坡墙框住。在浪花中，共有 8 名士兵背着步枪和背包向岸边涉水前进，周围布满了捷克刺猬型路障、汹涌的海水、烟雾、远处的火光以及遭受轰炸的海岸线。最底部是一条密集的微小制作人员名单，下方是醒目的红色上映日期行：{argument name="release text" default="即将上映"}，紧随其后是一行较小的白色文字：“致敬他们的牺牲。”。色调为炭灰色、钢蓝色、泥棕色，并配以红色强调字体。超精细、写实、高对比度、情绪化、史诗感、历史感、戏剧性的影院海报设计，具有真实的胶片颗粒感、体积烟雾、做旧纹理、对称构图，是顶级大片的主视觉艺术。
tags: 二战诺曼底登陆电影海报

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 皮克斯风格3D表情贴纸包
prompts.prompt:
Use the uploaded selfie as the ONLY face reference and generate a {argument name="style" default="Pixar-style 3D animated"} sticker pack. The character must clearly look like the person in the selfie. Arrange nine stickers as a {argument name="grid layout" default="tidy 3x3 grid collage"} at a strict {argument name="aspect ratio" default="4:5"} aspect ratio. Each cell shows a different pose and a distinct facial expression. Style and feel: Pixar-style 3D animation with a meme-y vibe, exaggerated and slightly absurd emotions, playful overacting.

Expressions need to read clearly even at small sizes, with very expressive eyes, eyebrows, and mouth, plus subtle hand gestures where they fit. Output on a fully transparent PNG background, no backdrop, no drop shadows. No text, captions, logos, or UI elements. The stickers should be ready to drop straight into messengers. Keep hairstyle, outfit, colors, and character proportions consistent across all nine cells; only the facial expression and pose change.

Final result should be a clean, polished 3D sticker look. The nine emotions, one per cell in the 3x3 grid: Surprised, Annoyed, Confused, Frustrated, Thoughtful, Sarcastic, Worried, Bored, Curious.
tags: 个人资料 / 头像 - 皮克斯风格3D表情贴纸包

prompts.title: 韩式甜米露恶搞广告海报
prompts.prompt:
创作一张风格大胆的韩式饮料广告海报，背景为温暖的金色液体飞溅效果，并采用戏剧性的商业灯光。画面展示一位 {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="类似唐纳德·特朗普的年长男性政客"} 的半身像，他身穿海军蓝西装、白衬衫，系着鲜红色领带，衣领上别着一枚小小的美国国旗徽章，正对着镜头露出自信的推销表情。他的面部被一个肤色的扁平矩形遮挡块遮住。他左手以强制透视法伸向镜头前方，手中拿着一罐黄色的韩国甜米露铝罐，罐身显著标注韩文，顶部和底部带有红色条纹，主产品文字为“비락 식혜”以及“Since 1993”。罐身上还印有较小的韩文说明、底部的甜米露图案以及容量文字“238 ml (120 kcal)”。他的右手竖起大拇指。

采用充满活力的复古商业构图，背景中有飞溅的甜米露和液滴，带有闪耀的金色高光，并使用略微仰视的英雄式取景。在顶部，包含 3 组醒目的标题文字：左上角是一句手写风格的黑色标语“전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!”，中央是巨大的做旧粗体韩文标题，深棕黑色文字写着“걸죽는 땐?”，鲜红色文字写着“비락 식혜!”，右上角是品牌标志“비락”，下方附有红色小字“Since 1993”。添加 2 个标注徽章：左侧是一个带有微型皇冠图标的黄色圆形印章，文字为“대한민국 국민음료 No.1”；右侧是一个白色对话气泡，内含手写韩文“한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!”和红色英文“I LOVE IT!”。

在底部前景处，放置 2 种食物元素：左侧是一个盛满甜米露和漂浮米粒的黄铜碗，右侧是一个堆满白米的木碗。在下部中间位置，添加 2 行大型毛笔风格的促销文字，第一行白色文字为“달콤하게! 시원하게!”，第二行白色与黄色相间的文字为“속까지 시~원하게!”，并配以充满活力的黄色下划线。在最底部，包含 3 个圆形功能图标，配有韩文说明：“국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료”、“시원하게 갈증해소”以及“부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜”。在右下角，添加微小的免责声明文字“연출된 이미지입니다”。整体视觉效果需呈现出光泽感、夸张、幽默，并像病毒式传播的恶搞印刷广告一样令人信服。

prompts.title: 信息图/教育视觉 - 日式水彩速写风格分层海报
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vintage hand-drawn Japanese infographic poster titled {argument name="headline text" default="AIイラスト用手描き風／水彩・スケッチ系画風Tier表３"}, presenting a tier/list of AI illustration prompt styles for hand-drawn, watercolor, and sketch aesthetics.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 4:5 aspect ratio, aged cream parchment paper background with stained edges, subtle grid texture, washi tape scraps, ink dots, small stars, botanical doodles, and scrapbook-like decorative framing. Use navy blue handwritten Japanese title typography with watercolor accents.

Top area: Large title across the upper left. Under it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle: 「フリーハンド・水彩スプラッシュ・柔らかい線画表現に使える画風プロンプト一覧」. Place a decorative memo card on the left with four checkbox bullets about soft lines, blurring, mixed media, and warmth. Across the center top, show exactly 4 taped sample swatches: 1 graphite scribble sketch sheet, 1 blue watercolor blot sheet, 1 pink-purple watercolor blot sheet, and 1 black urban line sketch sheet. On the upper right, show a seated young woman artist with long dark hair wearing a patterned shawl, surrounded by brushes, ink bottles, a watercolor palette, and a sketchbook; include a small speech bubble saying 「画材感で使い分けてね。」 and a small note reading “Create Inspire Explore”.

Main layout: A clean 3-column by 4-row grid of exactly 12 rounded rectangular information cards. Each card has a colored circular number badge from 1 to 12 at the top left, a tiny category line reading “C. 手描き風 / 水彩 / スケッチ (Hand-drawn / Watercolor / Sketch)”, an English style name, Japanese style name, short Japanese explanation, “Sample Prompt:” in English, and a small hand-drawn sample illustration. Use dark navy text, warm beige card backgrounds, thin blue-gray borders, and delicate watercolor shadows.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 虚构世界地图拼贴尝试
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a screenshot-like collage showing a pile of unusable AI-generated fictional world map attempts on a pale gray workspace, as if viewed on an image-generation history board. The subject is not one map, but a messy contact sheet of many map thumbnails for a future fictional nation.

Canvas: Wide 16:10 landscape canvas, light gray background with a faint dotted grid pattern. Leave generous gutters between thumbnails. The entire composition should feel like a zoomed-out browser or design-board view, with some thumbnails cut off by the right edge.

Layout: Arrange exactly 35 visible map thumbnails in an irregular grid. Count them as: 8 small thumbnails across the top row, 10 large landscape thumbnails in the middle two rows, 12 smaller portrait/landscape thumbnails in the lower middle arranged in paired columns, and 5 large purple-themed thumbnails along the bottom row. Include several partially cropped thumbnails on the far right edge to imply the board continues off-screen.

Thumbnail content: Each thumbnail is a different failed variation of a futuristic world map for {argument name="fictional nation name" default="United Federation of Valoria"}. Most maps show altered Earth-like continents but not an accurate real-world map. Use dark navy or black ocean backgrounds, neon blue coastlines, cyan glowing borders, faint green landmasses, satellite-map textures, grid overlays, small HUD-like ticks, and occasional white title text. Some thumbnails should look like color tests: one bright blue-and-yellow terrain map, one simple black-outline map on white, and multiple glowing cyberpunk versions. The bottom row should use a different purple faction label, {argument name="bottom faction name" default="Empathia Union"}, with purple-highlighted landmasses around Eurasia/Australia-like shapes.

Visible labels: Repeat the title text on many thumbnails, usually centered or near the lower third, reading {argument name="main map label" default="United Federation of Valoria"}. Vary the typography and size slightly so some labels are tiny, misaligned, or awkwardly placed. Bottom-row thumbnails should instead read {argument name="purple map label" default="Empathia Union"}. A few labels may be partially illegible due to scale, cropping, or glow.

Visual style: Make it look like a collection of generated image results, not a polished infographic. Use inconsistent map compositions, inconsistent coastline shapes, different zoom levels, different title placements, and slightly mismatched aspect ratios. The dominant palette is black, deep navy, electric cyan, blue, green, and purple, with occasional white thumbnails and one or two bright terrain-map thumbnails.

Constraints: Do not create a single clean world map. Do not make the continents match the real Earth exactly. Do not add people, UI controls, large captions, watermarks, or a polished final design. Preserve the feeling of many discarded attempts scattered on a pale dotted canvas.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 虚构世界地图拼贴尝试

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 蒸汽朋克身高差海报
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a nostalgic vertical height-difference character poster in a warm steampunk anime storybook style, showing an enormous gentle robot and a small child standing beside a central measuring ruler.

Canvas: Vertical portrait poster, 3:4 ratio, aged parchment texture with a pale blue-green background, sepia stains, thin decorative brown border, slightly worn corners, soft watercolor-and-ink illustration finish.

Layout: Place a full-body steampunk robot on the left, towering to about 250 cm, and a small young girl on the right, about 110 cm tall. A vertical height ruler runs down the exact center from 0 cm at the bottom to 250 cm at the top, with centimeter tick marks and labeled increments every 10 cm. At the top center, add a small vintage label plaque reading 「身長計」. The robot gently bends or reaches down, and the girl reaches up so their fingers touch around the 110 cm mark, creating a tender height-gap scene.

Subject details: The left character is {argument name="tall character" default="a 250 cm antique brass steampunk robot named クロノ"}, bulky but kind, covered in riveted metal plates, exposed gears, pipes, gauges, clock faces, round glass lenses, a large wind-up key on its back, and a small smokestack releasing a soft puff of steam. The right character is {argument name="short character" default="a 110 cm little girl named メイ"}, cute anime style, wearing rolled dark green overalls, a cream striped long-sleeve shirt, brown shoes, and an orange hair ribbon tying a side ponytail. Keep the child’s face softly simplified or obscured, with the body language expressing affection and trust.

Text content: Include exactly 2 top character information cards, one at upper left and one at upper right. Left card text: 「おなまえ」, “Name”, 「クロノ」, 「身長」, “Height”, “250cm”. Right card text: 「おなまえ」, “Name”, 「メイ」, 「身長」, “Height”, “110cm”. Add the large Japanese phrase {argument name="main phrase" default="時を超えた絆"} in brown calligraphy on the right-center area. Add exactly 2 comic thought bubbles: one near the robot around the upper center saying {argument name="robot bubble text" default="守るよ"} with a small heart and gear doodles, and one near the girl on the right saying {argument name="girl bubble text" default="大好き"} with stars, sparkles, and a smiling face doodle.

Visual style: Nostalgic Japanese illustrated poster, whimsical steampunk fantasy, delicate linework, muted browns, brass, cream, and faded teal tones, softly shaded, textured paper grain, hand-drawn measuring scale, warm emotional atmosphere.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 characters, exactly 2 information cards, exactly 2 thought bubbles, and one central height scale labeled 0–250 cm. Keep all typography vintage brown, preserve the Japanese text exactly where specified, avoid modern UI elements, avoid photorealism, no extra characters, no watermark.

Goal: Create a dramatic anime-style financial loss illustration of a fantasy elf noblewoman investor panicking at her desk after a stock portfolio crash.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, high-detail digital anime painting, cinematic lighting, dark office/trading room atmosphere, slightly cluttered foreground desk, no watermark.

Main subject: Center a young adult elf princess or queen with long flowing blonde hair, pointed ears, a gold spiked crown, white gloves, a red royal dress with ornate gold armor-like trim, a white cape, and a blue-purple gemstone pendant. She is seated behind a desk, gripping both sides of her head in despair. Cover the entire face area with a plain opaque beige square censor block, positioned centrally over the face, with no facial features visible.

Background and layout: On the left, place one large dark stock-market monitor showing Japanese loss information in red, including the headline {argument name="portfolio value label" default="持ち株評価額"}, a huge red negative value {argument name="main loss amount" default="-2,456,789円"}, and a smaller line {argument name="daily change text" default="前日比 -18.73%"}. Below it, include a red jagged downward line chart with y-axis numbers around 1,600 to 2,600 and time labels from 09:00 through 13:00, ending in a large downward red arrow.

Foreground desk items: Include exactly 8 visible paper-related elements: 1 printed loss report on the left labeled {argument name="loss report title" default="損益報告書"} with red amount “-2,456,789円”; 1 central portfolio list sheet labeled {argument name="holdings list title" default="保有銘柄一覧"} showing exactly 4 red percentage losses with downward arrows: “-15.20%”, “-21.45%”, “-17.88%”, and “-20.31%”; 1 loose paper at the front-left edge; 1 flying paper in the lower-left foreground; 1 floating document behind the desk on the left; 1 floating document on the right labeled “含み損” with a red downward zigzag arrow; and exactly 2 crumpled paper balls on the desk, one near the center-right and one near the lower-right. Also include one white teacup with gold decoration at the far right edge of the desk.

Emotional details: Add exactly 2 white spiral stress scribbles above the character’s head, one to the left and one to the right. Use scattered paper, downward red arrows, and tense body language to communicate panic, regret, and financial despair.

Visual style: Polished GPT-image-2 style anime illustration, sharp linework, rich highlights on gold ornaments, soft glowing rim light on hair, detailed fabric and armor, dark cool background contrasted with vivid red loss numbers. Keep all visible Japanese text legible and integrated into the scene.

prompts.prompt:
[Pose and Expression]
[{argument name="subject" default="The person from Image 1"}] is standing on a sandy beach, turned around and looking slightly over their right shoulder with a soft smile. The subject is stably captured in the center of a square frame made by someone else's hands in the foreground, about 4m away. Hyper-realistic.

[Hair and Makeup Details]
Has long, voluminous, and natural wavy light brown hair hanging down the back. Makeup emphasizes a natural skin tone suitable for a beach environment, and the subject is wearing a simply designed {argument name="top" default="light yellow short-sleeved T-shirt"}.

[Lighting and Light Direction]
Warm and subtle natural afternoon sunlight envelops the entire beach. Warm light permeates the subject's face and hair, making them appear bright, while the hands in the foreground forming the frame are silhouetted in the dark against the light.

[Texture and Color Mood]
An overall warm and faded yellowish tone characteristic of vintage film cameras persists, with fine film grain texture. The intimacy of the first-person perspective combines with the romantic analog sentiment of the beach to create a nostalgic mood.

[Film and Lens Depth, Angle]
A first-person eye-level perspective angle viewing the person through a frame made with both hands. Using an extremely shallow depth of field, the fingers in the foreground are very blurry and distorted, while focus is sharp only on the subject at a medium distance.

[Background Elements (Optional)]
The blue sea with white foaming waves and a wide sandy beach stretch out in the background. Dark rocks are visible on the wet sand in the lower left, and the silhouette of a hazy palm tree coastline and clear sky are visible at the far right end of the horizon.

prompts.title: 奇幻漫画魔法爆发页面
prompts.prompt: 一张极具戏剧性的黑白奇幻漫画页面，采用高细节的墨线艺术和网点纸风格，垂直漫画排版，共 2 个分镜。上方分镜为全宽动作场景，展示了一名年轻的动漫风格男法师，约莫十几岁，站在开裂的岩石地面上，右手向画面左侧伸出，正在施展强大的法术。他留着凌乱的短浅色头发，有着大而严肃的眼睛，神情冷静且专注。他身穿高领斗篷，身后随风飘动，内搭衬衫和扣式马甲，穿着合身的裤子、靴子，腰间系着带有小袋的腰带，并配有魔杖或小型魔法工具的皮套，领口处有宝石扣。在他张开的手掌前方，是一个巨大的发光圆形魔法阵，带有复杂的同心符号和符文装饰。法术爆发出一团巨大的白光和能量，向外喷涌，伴随着密集的加速线、黑色碎片云、破碎的岩石块、尘土和充满背景的冲击质感。画面左侧和下方前景融入了大型风格化的日语拟声词，营造出连续轰鸣的冲击感。构图动态且对比强烈，男孩位于画面中心偏右，爆炸占据了左半部分。下方分镜为较窄的反应特写，可见 1 名角色，展示了一名长发女巫的侧脸，面向左侧，戴着一顶带有华丽饰带和宝石的宽檐尖顶帽，披风上别着一枚珠宝胸针。她的脸部中央被一个实心的矩形审查遮挡块部分遮盖。在她身后，同样的爆炸和飞溅的瓦砾在远处持续。右侧有一个垂直的日语对话气泡，写着“……うわ”。使用整洁的漫画分镜边框，精致的专业少年奇幻漫画风格，强烈的动感，清晰的排线，网点阴影以及电影级的视觉冲击力。

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 四格复古厨房场景
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a colorful four-panel scene-design concept sheet for a cozy retro kitchen, in a whimsical flat 2D illustration style inspired by 1980s/1990s animation background art.

Canvas: Wide horizontal image, 16:9 aspect ratio, divided into exactly 4 rectangular panels by thin white gutters: two panels across the top row and two panels across the bottom row.

Setting: A bright, playful retro kitchen with {argument name="cabinet color" default="emerald green"} cabinets, pink trim, peach countertops, leafy trees visible outside the windows, and a warm pastel palette. Use clean ink lines, slightly imperfect hand-drawn perspective, screen-print-like colors, and cozy lived-in details.

Panel layout and contents:
- Panel 1, top left: wide eye-level view of the kitchen. Show green upper and lower cabinets, a black refrigerator covered with round magnets and stickers, a pink-and-white checkered towel, two tall windows with greenery outside, a peach counter, small appliances, a sink area, pendant lighting, and a central peach table. On the table are exactly 3 main objects: a plate of donuts, an open newspaper, and a pink bottle or condiment container. Include two mismatched chairs, one black and one pink.
- Panel 2, top right: upward-looking corner view emphasizing ceiling, pendant lights, upper cabinets, tall windows, and angled kitchen architecture. Show exactly 2 hanging pendant bulbs and cabinet doors tilted in perspective, with greenery visible through the windows.
- Panel 3, bottom left: close-up tabletop still life. Show a large peach tabletop with exactly 3 main object groups: a yellow plate holding assorted donuts, a spread of newspapers/magazines, and two pink table items consisting of one small cup/can and one tall bottle. The donut plate should contain exactly 7 visible donuts or pastries in varied colors, including pink frosted, chocolate, cream, and plain rings.
- Panel 4, bottom right: high overhead floor-plan view of the same kitchen. Show a black-and-white checkerboard floor, green cabinetry around the perimeter, pink countertops, windows, refrigerator, sink, stove, and the central table. On the table repeat exactly 3 object groups: donut plate, newspaper pile, and pink bottles/cups. Include exactly 2 chairs, one pink and one black.

Visual style: Saturated candy colors, teal-green cabinetry, bubblegum pink accents, peach table surfaces, black-and-white checkerboard floor, cream walls, simplified shapes, charmingly skewed perspective, retro anime background feel, crisp outlines, no photorealism.

Text: Newspapers may contain tiny illegible decorative print only; do not include readable headlines, logos, captions, watermarks, or UI elements.

Constraints: Keep all 4 panels consistent as views of the same kitchen scene. Preserve the cheerful retro color palette and hand-drawn illustrative look. Do not add people, pets, speech bubbles, or extra panels.
tags: 漫画 / 故事板 - 四格复古厨房场景

prompts.title: 动漫日落电影海报
prompts.prompt: 一张令人惊叹的黄金时刻日落动漫电影海报，采用垂直剧场版单张海报构图，以新海诚风格的精致青春剧情片画风绘制。场景俯瞰着一座向发光海湾延伸的日本沿海山坡小镇，太阳低垂在地平线上，倒影在平静的水面上拉长。天空占据了画面的大部分：深蓝色到淡紫色的暮色渐变，点缀着无数繁星、丝缕般的粉色和桃色云朵，右上角有一颗格外明亮的星星。前景右侧，一名十几岁的女高中生侧身面向左侧的大海，取景至大腿中部，齐肩黑发在微风中飘动，身穿短袖白色水手服，领口系着红色丝带，穿着深蓝色百褶裙；她表情沉思而忧郁。在左中方陡峭的石阶街道下方，一名十几岁的男高中生背对观众站立，身穿短袖白衬衫和深色长裤，同样望向日落和海洋。右下角包含 1 只坐在墙头或屋顶边缘的黑色剪影猫，正望向小镇。左下角包含 1 盏老式路灯，石墙边簇拥着一丛盛开的蓝色和紫色绣球花。下方的小镇挤满了瓦片屋顶、狭窄的街道、温暖的窗灯和层叠的房屋，远处的群山环绕着海湾。运用戏剧性的轮廓光、发光的空气透视、闪烁的高光、细腻的云层细节，以及靛蓝、群青、粉红、桃红和金色的情感化怀旧色调。将其设计为一张典型的日本动画电影海报，并将优雅的排版融入艺术作品中：左上至中心处有巨大的手写体日文标题 {argument name="title text" default="星をつなぐ約束のうた"}，下方有较小的英文副标题 {argument name="English subtitle" default="The Song of Promises"}，左上角有一行小巧的日文奖项桂冠，右上边缘有一行垂直的日文标语，底部中心有 4 个日文演职员名单，左下角有上映日期 {argument name="release date" default="8.23"} 以及下方的 "ROADSHOW" 字样，底部中心有一行粉色日文标语，右下角有网址/社交账号。超精细动漫主视觉图，浪漫而忧郁，高级电影海报质感。

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 哥特女仆超级英雄落地
prompts.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Noel"}, a blonde gothic-lolita maid heroine performing a superhero landing in the middle of a ruined city street. She is crouched low with one fist smashed into cracked pavement, one knee forward, the other leg bent back, body leaning toward the viewer in a powerful dynamic perspective. Her face is deliberately obscured by a centered opaque tan square censor block, while her long curly {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair explodes upward and outward from the impact, decorated with a frilly white maid headpiece. She wears an elaborate {argument name="outfit colors" default="black, pale pink, white, and gold"} frilled maid dress with layered ruffles, puffed sleeves, gold trim, a black bodice, pink-and-white apron details, white thigh-high stockings, glossy black Mary Jane shoes, and white cuffs with gold buttons. The environment is a cinematic disaster scene: tall shattered buildings forming a narrow urban canyon, broken stone slabs, dust clouds, debris and chunks of asphalt suspended in the air, impact cracks radiating from her fist, and a thin vertical blue-white energy beam descending from the sky behind her head. Use extreme low-angle perspective, intense motion, wind-swept fabric, flying rubble, volumetric sunlight breaking through smoke, high-detail anime rendering, sharp linework, glossy highlights, ornate costume details, dramatic backlighting, and a sense of explosive impact. Aspect ratio 3:4, full-body composition, no text.

prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a moody cinematic 3x3 photo grid showing an intimate late-night cafe scene between two young women, with every face deliberately obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks.

Canvas: Square image, 1:1 aspect ratio, divided into exactly 9 equal panels with thin dark borders, like a contact sheet or mood board.

Visual style: Photorealistic, cinematic low-key lighting, warm amber cafe lamps mixed with cool blue rainy window light, shallow depth of field, realistic film grain, dark wood textures, muted brown and charcoal palette, soft reflections on glass, quiet melancholic atmosphere.

Setting: A cozy vintage cafe at night during rain, with wooden tables, bookshelves, brick walls, an espresso machine, handwritten menu boards, small table lamps, blurred city lights outside wet windows, and a contemplative private mood.

Characters: Two young adult women, {argument name="first woman appearance" default="long dark wavy hair, dark oversized knit sweater"} and {argument name="second woman appearance" default="short black bob haircut, floral V-neck dress"}. They sit close together, speak quietly, hold cups, look down or toward each other, with subdued body language. Their faces must be hidden by opaque or heavily blurred rectangular blocks so no facial details are visible.

Panel layout: Include exactly 9 distinct panels. 1) Top-left: both women seated at a small wooden cafe table by a rainy window, two coffee cups on the table, warm lamp glow. 2) Top-center: close-up portrait of the short-haired woman in the floral dress, bookshelf behind her, face covered by a dark blur rectangle. 3) Top-right: side view of the long-haired woman alone beside a rain-streaked window, hand near her face, blue city bokeh outside. 4) Middle-left: close-up tabletop still life with the long-haired woman’s sleeve and hand, a lighter or small metal object, a crumpled tissue, and two coffee cups. 5) Middle-center: close-up of the short-haired woman touching her face or chin, floral neckline visible, face obscured by a vertical blur block. 6) Middle-right: wider cafe counter view with espresso machine, shelves of jars and cups, menu boards, the short-haired woman seated at the table with coffee. 7) Bottom-left: still life of a steaming coffee cup beside an old worn notebook or diary on the wooden table. 8) Bottom-center: intimate close two-shot of both women leaning near each other, cups in foreground, both faces covered by blur blocks. 9) Bottom-right: wide atmospheric shot of both women sitting across from each other near a window, rain and city lights outside, lamp on the table, plants and dark cafe interior framing them.

Text content: No readable text except vague illegible cafe menu marks or notebook scribbles.

Constraints: Maintain the exact 3 by 3 grid and exactly 9 panels; keep faces intentionally anonymized with rectangular blur masks; avoid smiles, bright daylight, modern sterile interiors, extra people, logos, watermarks, captions, or comic-style illustration.
